    return result

    return distance

def replace_placeholders(template, placeholder):
    path = template
    start_index = path.find('{{')
    end_index = path.find('}}', start_index)
    path = path[:end_index] + 'REPLACEMENT' + path[end_index:]
    placeholder_start = path.find(placeholder)
    path = path[:placeholder_start] + 'REPLACEMENT' + path[placeholder_start + len(placeholder) + 1:]
    return path

def replace_path_segment(path, segment):
    path = path
    start_index = path.find('/')
    end_index = path.find('/', start_index + 1)
    path = path[:end_index] + '/replacement' + path[end_index:]
    segment_index = path.find(segment)
    path = '/replacement' + path[segment_index + len(segment):]
    return path
